chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-1598 of 2022 (Shakeel Ahmed & another Vs. P.O Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.6571/2022 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 28-03-2024. Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General >>>>>>..<<<<<< It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioners that the Commissioner Sukkur has passed the impugned order without providing chance of hearing to them, therefore, it is liable to be set-aside, which is opposed by learned AAG Sindh by supporting the impugned order. Apparently, the impugned order has been passed without providing chance of hearing to the petitioners, which is contrary to the mandate contained by Article 10-A of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, which prescribes right of fair trial. Consequently, the impugned order is set-aside with direction to the Commissioner Sukkur to pass the same afresh after providing chance of hearing to all the concerned. The instant petition is disposed of accordingly along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
